title: Canon Tool Card
description: Standard fiche format for any tool item inside resources/canon/{atlas}/{layer}/{tool}.json. Each canon tool is a navigable, composable, validatable item. Loaded by /phantom canon {atlas} {layer} {tool} drill mode. Schema v1.1 (v2.37+) adds attribution_layer, validated_at, decay_ttl_days, _isolation_boundary, brand_slug as required on validations[] entries to block silent atlas pollution (red team A1, A4, A5, A7).

id.description: Tool slug, kebab-case. Unique within its layer.

atlas.description: Top-level atlas this tool belongs to. v2.26 ships copy only.

principle.description: 1-3 sentences. What is this tool, what problem it solves.

structure.description: How the tool is shaped, in plain words. Optional if principle is enough.

gabarits.description: Concrete templates the operator can fill. 2-5 entries.

when_works.description: Conditions under which the tool performs. Often references other canon items: 'stade conscience: problem-aware', 'sophistication: vague 3+', 'trafic: froid'.

combines_with.description: Cross-references to other canon items this tool composes well with. Drives compose mode and copy-matrix.

anti_patterns.description: Common misuses. Frame as 'X without Y' or 'X done lazy'.

validations.description: Append-only log of brand-side validations. Populated by learn-from-session promotion. Each entry is a contextualised signal that this tool worked or fatigued in a real run. Schema v1.1 (v2.37+) enforces attribution_layer, validated_at, decay_ttl_days, brand_slug, _isolation_boundary on every NEW write to block silent pollution and lock-in (red team A1/A4/A5/A7). Entries written under v1.0 remain readable; missing fields treated as `unknown` for attribution and as `validated_at = captured_at fallback` for decay.

validation_id.description: v2.37+ stable identifier of the validation entry.

brand_slug.description: Brand qui a validé. Isolation boundary v2.37+ (red team A7 cross-contamination).

audience_slug.description: Audience scope of the validation. Optional but recommended.

outcome.description: Outcome of the test. v1.0 enum (validated/fatigued/inconclusive/rejected) preserved for backward compat read; v1.1 adds (success/neutral/failed) for finer-grained signals. Skill authors normalise to v1.1 vocabulary on new writes.

attribution_layer.description: v2.37+ REQUIS. À quoi est attribué le signal (success/failed). Bloque pollution atlas vivant par signaux non-imputables (red team A5). `unknown` autorisé mais déclenche operator gate avant write.

validated_at.description: v2.37+ REQUIS. Date de la validation pour decay calculation (YYYY-MM-DD).

decay_ttl_days.description: v2.37+ REQUIS. TTL après lequel cette validation est considérée stale. Empêche lock-in monoculturel sur winners anciens (red team A4). Default 90 jours, override autorisé par skill (ex 30 jours pour formats TikTok fast-decay, 180 pour benefit chains slow-decay).

metric.description: v1.0 free-form metric string. Preserved for backward compat read; v1.1 prefers metric_observed + metric_value.

context_snapshot.description: État brand au moment validation (pour audit historique).

captured_at.description: v1.0 timestamp. Preserved. v1.1 read fallback when validated_at absent.

_isolation_boundary.description: v2.37+ enforce brand-only scope. Empêche cross-contamination multi-brand (red team A7). Auto-set on write.

lineage.description: Where this tool comes from. Helps audit doctrine.

_field_types.description: Per-field type annotation: stated | derived | structured.
